demo_timestamps.description: implementation of APS security measures and SSA, APS API filtering

client_mentions.name: Arcade
client_mentions.context: use of APS API for secure access and cross-project analytics

ai_technologies.name: Azure AI Foundry
ai_technologies.context: used with SSA, APS API to limit project access

ai_technologies.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
ai_technologies.context: used for integration of SEC features within Autodesk Assistant

summary: The video discusses securing Autodesk's APS Hubs by implementing API filtering to avoid using insecure 2LO access methods. It highlights the importance of using SSA, APS API for cross-project data access in a more secure and filtered manner. Azure AI Foundry and Microsoft Copilot Studio are mentioned as tools integrated into this security framework.
